1.description: resolve Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in the municipality with point geometry

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (climate normal/na) for municipality reduction

4.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to those intersecting the municipality geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: count distinct buildings that intersect storm-surge areas

8.description: limit final result to one row
